reach_why: Extends familiar worries about priors, analogy, and underdetermination, but does not open clearly new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links cultural priors, structural analogy, toy cases, and opaque truths into one fallibilist stress test.
falsifiable_why: Parts are testable via search bias and analogy studies, but core claims remain methodological and interpretive.
explanation: It shows inquiry can fail when priors, analogies, and opaque truths distort theory choice.
